title: Fleet Manager v0.1.0 Execution Root
description: Shared feature container for implementing the first fleet-management CLI surface, including registry management, project subprocess adapters, fleet execution and watch flows, run logging, and boundary enforcement for cross-project orchestration.
acceptance_criteria: All work for Fleet Manager v0.1.0 is coordinated under this feature root.
Developer work is split into focused, dependency-ordered beads with clear file ownership.
Exactly one shared tester bead, one shared documentation bead, and one shared review bead exist under this feature and depend on the full implementation tree as required by the spec.
